list.description: OAuth 2.0 / OIDC applications that delegate authentication to Qeet ID. Confidential apps receive a client secret on registration; public apps use PKCE.
list.emptyDescription: Click Register application to add your first OAuth / OIDC client.

credentials.title: Client credentials for {{name}}
credentials.description: Copy the secret now — it’s bcrypt-hashed server-side after this and can’t be shown again.

delete.title: Delete this application?
delete.descriptionNamed: Apps using the client ID for {{name}} will immediately stop being able to authenticate. This can’t be undone.
delete.descriptionFallback: Apps using this client ID will stop working.

create.title: Register OAuth / OIDC application
create.description: Creates an OIDC client. Confidential clients receive a one-time client secret.
create.name: Name
create.redirectUrisHelp: One URL per line. Must be HTTPS in production; localhost is allowed for dev.

detail.notFoundDescription: It may have been deleted, or you may not have permission to view it. Use the back link above to return to the list.
detail.name: Name
detail.secretDescription: Rotating invalidates the current secret immediately. The new value is shown once.
detail.secretCopyHint: Copy it now — it’s bcrypt-hashed server-side and can’t be shown again.
detail.dangerZoneDescription: Deleting stops every app using this client ID from authenticating.
detail.deleteDescription: Apps using the client ID for {{name}} will immediately stop being able to authenticate. This can’t be undone.
